violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (outside and kitchen) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025

The pizza prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
Outside dumpster area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and other debris. Refuse area must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
The ceiling in the (kitchen and pizza prep ) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
